title: Tynan Thompson Moves to Manchester United According to Reports
description: Recent reports indicate Tynan Thompson has moved to Manchester United. Tottenham Hotspur and RTE.ie covered the story, while Manchester Evening News mentioned an £8m deal.

sources.title: Transfer wrap: Thompson moves to United, Villa land Gomes
Manchester United sign exciting young winger in £8m deal as they pull off Premier League coup

sections.heading: Transfer Announcement
paragraphs: According to Tottenham Hotspur, there has been a 'United switch for Tynan'. Additionally, RTE.ie reported in a transfer wrap that 'Thompson moves to United'.

sections.heading: Deal Details
paragraphs: The Manchester Evening News reported that Manchester United signed an 'exciting young winger' in an '£8m deal'.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The search term 'tynan thompson' had a reported lower bound of 2000 searches in the GB region. The trend feed was published on July 20, 2026.

faq.q: Which club has Tynan Thompson joined?
faq.a: According to Tottenham Hotspur and RTE.ie, Thompson has moved to United.

faq.q: What is the value of the transfer deal?
faq.a: The Manchester Evening News reported the transfer as an '£8m deal'.
The Manchester Evening News described the player as an 'exciting young winger'.
